title: Kanupapa
desc: A judge faces difficulty keeping his daughter safe from a convict he imprisoned. He gets murdered. Then a blind a man tries to defend his daughter.

title: Mass
desc: Priya lives in a city that is paralyzed with fear by the local crippled gangster, Satya and his dreaded son, Shatru.

title: Yamakantri (Villu)
desc: A son seeks revenge for his army officer father, falsely killed by corrupt officers, but his mission turns complicated when he falls in love with one of the killer's daughters.

title: Nene Raju Nene Mantri
desc: Padma takes up the challenge of reforming Rajendra to pay back her benefactor's daughter, Rupa. Things get complicated when Rajendra falls in love with Padma while Rupa suspects Padma's intentions.

desc: Aruna uses black magic to reclaim her ex-lover from his devoted wife.

desc: 2 boys kidnap their neighbor's wife for ransom. Later they learn that her husband wants to kill her for property so they rescue her from his clutches.
